user_query: I want to explore the Taiwanese music scene. Can you suggest a playlist on Deezer that includes the top songs from Taiwan? Additionally, it would be great if you could provide me with some similar songs to dive deeper into Taiwanese music.

TaskList.description: Query Deezer API to fetch the top songs from Taiwan and create a playlist.
Based on the top songs retrieved in Subtask 1, query Deezer API to fetch similar songs.
